texts: Writing the file and invoking the skill simultaneously.
The file was created. The skill name needs the `cat:` prefix — retrying.

The `date.md` file was created successfully. However, the `cat:instruction-builder-agent` skill is failing because the CAT v2.1 client binary couldn't be downloaded (404 error shown in the session start), so the plugin infrastructure is non-functional. You'd need to resolve the client bundle download before CAT skills can run.
